_comment: Ogle offline demo — DRIFTED signatures. Same graph as healthy-signatures.json, but dbt.orders (a serving-path table feeding the churn model) has three simultaneous drifts: SCHEMA (order_total DOUBLE -> STRING), VOLUME (row count collapsed 1.25M -> 40K), and QUALITY (order_total null fraction 0.001 -> 0.42). customers is unchanged, so the alert stays scoped to the real blast radius.
